name: Dak's Rosemary Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 1-1/4 cups Better for Bread white flour
1/2 cup Jack or mozzarella cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the browning control to light.
2. Add all ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting and press "Start."
